title: A1 Student Supports and Differentiation Contract
source_authority: Cycle A Student Packet Bundle v3 SOURCE_INTEGRATED
Cycle A Teacher Binder v3 SOURCE_INTEGRATED
principle: Differentiation is not a separate easier assignment. Supported, Proficient, and Extending versions must aim at the same learning target and preserve the same core reasoning move.

required_student_support_outputs.description: Every major worksheet or assessment must include Supported, Proficient, and Extending pathways.
required_features: same learning goal across all tiers
scaffolds reduced or expanded by tier
teacher notes explaining how to assign or offer tiers

required_student_support_outputs.description: Major tasks must include visual/structured organizers, not only open-response lines.
A1 must include a student notes package aligned to the daily slides and teacher sequence.
A1 must include vocabulary supports suitable for Grade 11/12 Psychology students without watering down the concepts.
Teacher binder must explain how to use supports without creating separate learning goals.
required_features: who may need the Supported version
how to move students from Supported to Proficient
what Extending should add beyond extra length
assessment accommodations that preserve the same standard

qa_expectations: Fail if a major worksheet has only one undifferentiated open-response task.
Fail if Supported, Proficient, and Extending tasks target different learning goals.
Fail if graphic organizers are missing from major work.
Fail if a notes package is missing for the 10-day A1 sequence.
Fail if differentiation is only listed in teacher notes but absent from student-facing materials.
Fail if support materials reduce the psychology reasoning target to vocabulary copying only.
current_gap: The current Day 1 proof includes some tier language and frames, but it does not yet render a complete A1 differentiated student packet, graphic organizer set, or notes package. These must be treated as missing required outputs.
